top_patterns.description: Opens with personal insight, ends with a prompt or link.
top_patterns.structure_template: I [personal insight]. [Call to action or link]
example_quotes: Move your body before the thoughts take over.

top_patterns.description: Shares a personal story, ends with gratitude or lesson.
example_quotes: My mom wrote a cookbook called Butter Busters... I was 15 watching it all happen.
Love you mom! And thank you rhinos!!

top_patterns.description: States an observation, offers a simple piece of advice.
example_quotes: If you know a veteran, call them.
If it’s not on your calendar, it’s not a priority.

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Share a thought, direct to further content
example_quotes: The full story is on my Substack. Link in my bio!
I just wrote a new Substack about this idea. Click the link in my bio.
Which leg of your stool needs the most attention right now?
Are you making space for what matters?

closers: Wishing you a day full of connection, purpose, and maybe a little adventure.
bridge_phrases: Then today after a great night sleep, I woke up and felt great again.
Sometimes the hardest chapters come from a combination of small shifts.
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often 1-2 lines.
language_habits.line_break_style: Frequent line breaks after key ideas or for emphasis.

example_quotes: Yesterday was really scary. I woke up and felt depressed again.
Sometimes it’s your body saying, “I can’t play this role anymore.”
Growth mindset isn’t motivation.... it’s endurance.
Open loops. Half-finished thoughts. Endless tabs in my mind.
Love you mom! And thank you rhinos!!
Invest in the people who lift you back up.

anti_patterns: Lack of storytelling or personal narrative

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake’s current voice is authentic, vulnerable, and focused on personal growth, connection, and practical advice.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More storytelling and emotional honesty, less abstract motivation.
